chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 2844 of 2023 (Waqar Ahmed and another v. The State) Date Order with signature of Judges Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.5358/24 21.05.2024 Mr. Imtiaz Ali, advocate for the applicants Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General for the State ----------------------------------- The applicants were admitted to bail by this court vide order dated 19.2.2024 subject to their furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.2,00,000/- each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. The applicants by way of the listed application have sought a reduction of the surety amount to a considerable extent, which as per their learned counsel the applicants are unable to furnish on account of their poor financial position. Learned Additional PG for the State is fair enough to say that she would have no objection if the surety amount which the applicants are likely to furnish for their release on bail is reduced to a considerable extent. Heard arguments and perused the record. Consequent to the above discussion, it is directed that the applicants be released on bail in the subject case on their furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (rupees one lac) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. The listed application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E [ 2 ]
